title: The Eva Garage
wikitext:
[]: The Eva Garage             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Sat May 19, 2007 11:06 pm So, everyone here (or most people) knows that Misato drives a Renault Alpine A310. (I thought for the longest time that it was a DeTomaso Pantera, until I looked it up on Wikipedia) The question is, what kind of car would the other Eva characters drive? Here's my choice for Asuka, the Ford Shelby Mustang GT500 convertible. I think everyone expected Asuka's choice to be a German car, for heritage reasons, but I decided on the Shelby for two reasons. One, because of the image of the mustang as a feral horse, and it kinda fits in well with Asuka's personality, at least on the outside, with her wild abandon to be someone. Secondly, nothing screams "Look at me! I'm important!" more than a good old-fashioned burnout, and 500 supercharged horses ensure maximum hoonage, 'merican style. So, what else would the Eva characters drive? Discuss. :-)

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Sat May 19, 2007 11:16 pm Gendo-dodge magnum. Asuka-dodge viper. maya-VW beetle kensuke-hummer shinji-A haggard,blue,1984 ford escort.

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Sat May 19, 2007 11:18 pm Kyle wrote: Gendo-dodge magnum. Asuka-dodge viper. maya-VW beetle kensuke-hummer shinji-A haggard,blue,1984 ford escort.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat May 19, 2007 11:25 pm Gendo would take whatever car he normally drives and get it tricked out on "Pimp My Ride."

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Sat May 19, 2007 11:26 pm BrikHaus wrote: Gendo would take whatever car he normally drives and get it tricked out on "Pimp My Ride."

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat May 19, 2007 11:27 pm I can better see Asuka in a Porsche, perhaps a red GT3.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sat May 19, 2007 11:28 pm Ornette wrote: I can better see Asuka in a Porsche, perhaps a red GT3.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Sun May 20, 2007 7:00 am Actually Asuka is German, American, and Japanese so you could take something from any of the major automobile manufacturing countries and make it stick. Personally I see her wanting to drive Misato's car. Not because of what it is but because it belongs to Misato. It would be the whole perfume thing all over again. As for Gendo, would he even need a car? He's got a fleet of helicopters to take him anywhere he wants to go and IMO unless he has to I don't think he leaves the Geofront very often.

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Sun May 20, 2007 8:38 am Executor wrote: Ornette wrote: I can better see Asuka in a Porsche, perhaps a red GT3.

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Sun May 20, 2007 2:33 pm Gendo would ride in a limo. Asuka Red ferrari Maya pickup truck Shinji - a big wheel tricycle

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Sun May 20, 2007 5:15 pm DatDude wrote: Maya pickup truck Shinji - a big wheel tricycle

[]:             Quote Post by ferrarimanf355 » Sun May 20, 2007 8:13 pm slothen wrote: DatDude wrote: Maya pickup truck Shinji - a big wheel tricycle

[]:             Quote Post by Executor » Tue May 22, 2007 8:50 pm DatDude wrote: Gendo would ride in a limo. Asuka Red ferrari Maya pickup truck Shinji - a big wheel tricycle

[]:             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Thu Jun 07, 2007 1:27 pm Executor wrote: DatDude wrote: Gendo would ride in a limo. Asuka Red ferrari Maya pickup truck Shinji - a big wheel tricycle

[]:             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Thu Jun 07, 2007 5:29 pm Tricycle with MAD HYDRAULICS! Shinji would be 'ridin' dirty'... [url]http://youtube.com/watch?v=H3CaGKqdgic[/url] ...Ridin' Eva AMV (couldn't resist... :twisted: ) btw, Kenichi Sonoda ('Gunsmith Cats' mangaka) would be pleased with your choice of a Shelby GT500. It's his favorite car and the ride of Gunsmith Cats protagonist Rally Vincent. It's also in my garage in Gran Turismo.

[]:             Quote Post by n00dle » Sun Jun 10, 2007 1:39 pm Maya- VW Golf. Not a Beetle, a Golf! Dunno why, just seems like it fits. What does she drive in TToR404 btw? Rei- A hybrid or electric of some kind. Something small and nonthreatening. Aoba- Clearly a station wagon! He just seems like a surfer dude. Kaji- Something small, black and speedy, for all his spying needs. Shinji- A Pinto. Weak and impotent.

[]:             Quote Post by Bean Bandit » Sun Jun 10, 2007 2:44 pm n00dle wrote: Shinji- A Pinto. Weak and impotent.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sun Jun 10, 2007 9:46 pm n00dle wrote: Maya- VW Golf. Not a Beetle, a Golf! Dunno why, just seems like it fits. What does she drive in TToR404 btw?

[]:             Quote Post by Hailtheplatypus » Sun Jun 10, 2007 10:11 pm I always thought Shinji would always be one for public transportation. I just cant see him having the inituative to drive himself anywhere...

[]:             Quote Post by n00dle » Sun Jun 10, 2007 11:49 pm Huh...scary...Bob and me thought of the same car. Anyway, a tank does seem appropriate for Asuka doesn't it? However, I don't think it'd be a Tiger. Along the right lines, but this strikes me as just to blocky and inelegant for the over sexualized Asuka. No, I say she'd much rather have one of these babies: One word: smexy! And yeah, now that I think about it, Shinji's always on a train or a bus or some such. Doesn't seem like he'd drive much. Might bike though. Or maybe not...*thinks about young Shinji's bike theft incident in the manga*
